race.comment: CAFE AU LAIT (6) wasn't far away in a bunched finish fresh at Kyneton with improvement to come. She should appreciate the 1200m on the big track here and take holding out with a key danger coming out race morning. BOHEMIAN ANGEL (9) has just found one better in her past two starts, good behind a handy one at Sale last time out. Tricky draw but she should take beating if she can slot in midfield. ELECTRIC ELVIS (1) has placed in all three runs this time in and won't need to improve much to be going close here. OCEAN BAY (8) resumes for her local debut, now with Gavin Bedggood. Wary, watch the market.
